actions.label: Formalize login handler
actions.rationale: Model the login logic in IML

formalization.src_code: def login(email, stored): return email == stored
formalization.iml_code: let login (email : string) (stored : string) : bool = String.equal email stored

actions.label: Define case-insensitive login goal
actions.rationale: Check whether login handles case differences

vg_defined.description: Find inputs where case difference causes login to fail
vg_defined.src: let vg1 (email : string) (stored : string) = String.lowercase email = String.lowercase stored && not (login email stored)

actions.label: Run verification goal 1
actions.rationale: Check if case-insensitive mismatch is possible

model.src:
module M = struct
  let email = "User@Example.COM"
  let stored = "user@example.com"
end

actions.label: Fix login to be case-insensitive
actions.rationale: Verification found a case-sensitivity bug; apply fix

outcome.summary: Confirmed case-sensitivity bug via formal instance; applied fix
